interactables.name: Rylor
interactables.description: A fellow agri-farmer commissioned by the town of Lyoris. One of your good friends.

dialogues.condition: room.id == "room_4_4" AND player.hasQuest("clear_the_danger") AND NOT player.hasCompletedQuest("clear_the_danger") AND player.counter("interactable_defeated:threadhorn_staglet") >= 5
player.hasQuest("find_your_backpack") AND NOT player.hasCompletedQuest("find_your_backpack") AND NOT player.has_item("backpack")

nodes.text:
You found it! And quick timing, too. Another hour longer of searching and I'm not sure we'd make it back in one piece! 

To equip the backpack, go to the "Backpack" tab and double click your Agri-Farmer's Backpack. You'll notice you have a lot more space (along with some items you have collected from our haul).

Once you equip your backpack, click the square to the right of our current area on the minimap to travel to it. Let's start heading back to town.

dialogues.name: Rylor - Clear the Danger Complete
dialogues.description: Rylor returns to dialogue after helping the player clear the farmstead threat.

nodes.text: [narration]Rylor wipes the sweat off his forehead and you hear him panting softly. [/narration]That should hold the Threadhorns back for now.
[narration]He raises his Bioboard up and you hear him amend his log[/narration] "Note that the Hostile Fauna Index of two point fou--"

[narration]Rylor falls to the ground and clutches his chest. Blood oozes from the wound. He strains as he holds his head up.[/narration]. 

Bio..board. Agh... Download...No time left.

[narration]You run over to Rylor and examine his Bioboard. You hold up yours next to his and notice the whirring of both your machines. Three mists begin to manifest in small, spherical shapes above both bioboards. 

Your Bioboard detects these signatures and you hear a male voice in your head.

[/narration]

Host death imminent. Bioboard Ability transmission in progress. Please make your selection:

1) Blood Boil
2) Telekinetic Slam
3) Temporal Lash

[narration]The mist travels from Rylor's bioboard to your bioboard. You all of a sudden feel magical energy course through your body. The energy then focuses at the fingertips of your gauntlet.[/narration]

[narration]Rylor forces a smile[/narration].

Hostile index...should've...four-point-tw.... Cough[/narration]

Live...Courts...Die...
[narration] His eyes go blank and his Bioboard shuts down. The only sound you hear is the time dilation of the boar returning to normal.[/narration]

[narration] Rylor adjusts his backpack. He has collected a lot of GeneMaize_T.01 and struggles to walk with all the added weight.[/narration] How do you figure? You know, this blight and all. We used to have caravans of this stuff.

options.text: The blight is unrelenting, but we must carry on.
It feels hopeless, and I worry about Lyoris and its people.

nodes.text: [narration]He smiles at you and one of his eyebrows juts[/narration]. You know how to use your sword, right? Just start swinging!

[narration]Rylor smells the air. His Bioboard whirrs with anticipatory energy [/narration] The air stirs with unrest. I fear we are in the company of hostile fauna. [narration] Rylor readies his sword [narration].

Yeah, I agree. Our yields feels like they are shrinking with each passing harvest. Remember, we aren't the only ones who need to survive out here. [narration]He looks around the Farmstead with a watchful eye. [/narration]

Sometimes I just wish I could retire to Aelderis, start a family, and eat as much Libroberry Pie as I can. It's a simple life, really. [narration]Rylor daydreams for a second, then shakes himself back to reality with a somber expression on his face [/narration].

Live by the Courts and die by the Courts, I guess.

Don't discount hope too quickly. It's one of the strongest Magicks we possess. [narration]He glances at his hand and gesticulates it a bit.[/narration].

Virelios will have a plan for us. He always does. There's a reason why he is in the appointed position he is in.

dialogues.name: rylor_instructions
dialogues.description: While the player is on the quest 'Find Your Backpack', if you talk to Rylor during this quest, he will point you towards exploring.

nodes.text: Hit the "Explore" button on the top right of your screen to explore this area. Perhaps you left your backpack somewhere while gathering berries?

Who knew cutting dead plants could work up such an appetite? [narration]He lets out an exacerbated sigh as he picks up his backpack. [/narration]

[narration]He holds up his arm, revealing his bioboard. [/narration] Agri-Log #423: GeneMaize yield was 12% under expected yield. Harvest conditions were unsatisfactory. Hostile Fauna Index was 2.1 per harvest column.

[narration]He pronates his forearm twice and you hear a satisfactory chime. [/narration] The sky is tired. We should head back before it gets too dangerous out here. [narration] He looks around, and then looks at you, confused. [/narration]. Where did you leave your backpack?

[narration]Rylor pretends to speak into his Bioboard:[/narration] "Agri-farmer accomplice shows signs of blight zoonotic mutation. First symptom, short term. memory loss." [narration]He keep his head pointed at the Bioboard, but shifts his eyes up at you with a silly smirk[/narration].  Well, we don't want you returning to Virelios without any haul, so let's try to find it.

Hit the [color=#FFA74E] Explore [/color] button on the top right of your screen to navigate around this area. I'm sure it will come up sooner rather than later.

steps.text: The air smells of both life and death. The sky, struggling to stay awake, shines a dim glint on the farmland. It's been a long day of work, and it's time to return to a familiar place.

The Ironbriar fends off Rylor's defenses and impales him in the center of the chest. Rylor screams with pain and clutches the tusk of the boar. The boar retracts its tusk and Rylor falls to the ground.

A purple mist manifests around Rylor's Bioboard and, with his teeth clenched, he outstretches his arm and the mist quickly envelops the boar. The boar, mid charge, all of a sudden becomes slowed in time. It's legs appear suspended in the air, mid-stride-- its eyes still focused on Rylor.

quests.name: Clear The Danger
quests.description: Rylor wants you to clear the area of danger to ensure the safety of Lyoris.

objectives.title: Clear the Hostile Fauna
objectives.description: Rylor wants you to clear the area of danger to ensure the safety of Lyoris.

quests.completedDescription: You have successfully dispatched of the threatened Threadhorns.

quests.name: Find Your Backpack
quests.description: Rylor wants you to Explore around Lyorin Outskirts to try to find your backpack.

objectives.title: Find Your Backpack
objectives.description: Rylor wants you to Explore around Lyorin Outskirts to try to find your backpack.

objectives.title: Talk to Rylor
objectives.description: You have found your backpack. Talk to Rylor when you're ready.

quests.name: Head to the Farmstead
quests.description: Rylor wants to regroup at the Lyorin Farmstead. Travel there and check in with him.

objectives.title: Travel to Lyorin Farmstead
objectives.description: Head east to the Lyorin Farmstead.

objectives.title: Talk to Rylor
objectives.description: Speak with Rylor at the Farmstead.

rooms.name: Lyorin Outskirts
rooms.description: You are surrounded by what farmland has survived the blight. You see the faint glow of your hometown, Lyoris, in the distance, and hear the hum of irrigation pumps working overtime to salvage the crops that still remain.

rooms.name: Lyorin Farmstead
rooms.description: The farmland here juxtaposes with the threatening blight that encroaches on its fauna. Animals tend to these plants as their last bastion of safety and survival. Another dance of life and death.

fixedInteractables.condition: NOT player.flag("rylor_patriarch_started") AND (NOT player.hasQuest("clear_the_danger") OR player.hasCompletedQuest("clear_the_danger") OR player.counter("interactable_defeated:threadhorn_staglet") >= 5)
